steps.title: Set the line equations equal
steps.content:
At the intersection, the two $y$-values are equal:

$$4x+7=5x-3$$
$$7=x-3$$
$$x=10$$

steps.title: Find the second coordinate
steps.content:
Substitute $x=10$ into either line:

$$y=4(10)+7=47$$

So the intersection point is $(10,47)$. The answer is C.
